name: Fluffy Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Fat-free or reduced fat ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ricotta cheese, sugar, milk, flour, lemon juice, lemon peel, vanilla, and salt in a bowl. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until fairly smooth.
2. Add eggs; beat until well combined.
3. Pour into pie crust; bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set. Cool completely on a wire rack. Cover with a dome from the graham-cracker crust and refrigerate at least 3 hours.
